goal: t:(seq int) -> a:int -> i:nat{i <= length t} -> j:int{-1 <= j /\ j < length t} -> Tot (option (r:nat{r < length t})) (decreases %[(j+1)-i])
t:(seq int) -> int -> Tot (option (r:nat{r < length t}))

t:(seq int) -> a:int -> i:nat{i <= length t} -> j:int{-1 <= j /\ j < length t} -> Lemma (requires True) (ensures (Some? (bsearch_rec t a i j) ==> (Some?.v (bsearch_rec t a i j) >= i) /\ (Some?.v (bsearch_rec t a i j) <= j) /\ (index t (Some?.v (bsearch_rec t a i j)) = a))) (decreases %[(j+1)-i])
t:(seq int) -> a:int -> Lemma (requires True) (ensures (Some? (bsearch t a) ==> (Some?.v (bsearch t a) >= 0) /\ (Some?.v (bsearch t a) < (length t)) /\ (index t (Some?.v (bsearch t a)) = a)))
y:int -> a:int -> Lemma (requires True) (ensures (forall x. (((x <= y) /\ (y < a) /\ (x = a)) ==> False)))

t:(seq int) -> a:int -> mid:int -> Lemma (requires (forall i1 i2. {:pattern index t i1; index t i2} (0 <= i1) ==> (i1 <= i2) ==> (i2 < length t) ==> (index t i1 <= index t i2)) /\ (0 <= mid) /\ (mid < length t) /\ (index t mid < a)) (ensures (forall p. (((0 <= p) /\ (p < length t) /\ (index t p = a) /\ (p <= mid)) ==> False)))
y:int -> a:int -> Lemma (requires True) (ensures (forall x. (((y <= x) /\ (a < y) /\ (x = a)) ==> False)))

t:(seq int) -> a:int -> mid:int -> Lemma (requires (forall i1 i2. {:pattern index t i1; index t i2} (0 <= i1) ==> (i1 <= i2) ==> (i2 < length t) ==> (index t i1 <= index t i2)) /\ (0 <= mid) /\ (mid < length t) /\ (a < index t mid)) (ensures (forall p. (((0 <= p) /\ (p < length t) /\ (index t p = a) /\ (mid <= p)) ==> False)))

t:(seq int) -> a:int -> i:nat{i <= length t} -> j:int{-1 <= j /\ j < length t} -> Lemma (requires (forall i1 i2. (0 <= i1) ==> (i1 <= i2) ==> (i2 < length t) ==> (index t i1 <= index t i2)) /\ (forall p. 0 <= p ==> p < length t ==> index t p = a ==> p < i ==> False) /\ (forall p. 0 <= p ==> p < length t ==> index t p = a ==> j < p ==> False)) (ensures ((None? (bsearch_rec t a i j)) ==> (forall p.

t:(seq int) -> a:int -> Lemma (requires (forall i1 i2. (0 <= i1) ==> (i1 <= i2) ==> (i2 < length t) ==> (index t i1 <= index t i2))) (ensures ((None? (bsearch t a)) ==> (forall p. 0 <= p ==> p < length t ==> index t p <> a)))
i:int -> l:list int{sorted l} -> Tot (m:list int{sorted m /\ permutation (i::l) m})
i:int -> l:list int{sorted l} -> Tot (m:list int{sorted m /\ permutation (i::l) m})
l:list int -> Tot (m:list int{sorted m /\ permutation l m})
l:list int -> Pure (list int & list int) (requires (Cons? l /\ Cons? (Cons?.tl l))) (ensures (fun r -> split_inv l (fst r) (snd r)))
l1:list int -> l2:list int -> Pure (list int) (requires (sorted l1 /\ sorted l2)) (ensures (fun l -> sorted l /\ permutation_2 l l1 l2 /\ merge_inv l1 l2 l)) #set-options "--z3rlimit 10"
l:list int -> Pure (list int) (requires True) (ensures (fun r -> sorted r /\ permutation l r)) (decreases (length l))

join 1 q new_q Leaf in join_repr 1 q new_q Leaf (keys q) (keys new_q) ms_empty; compact_preserves_keys r; assert (permutation pl (ms_append (ms_singleton k) ql)); find_max_is_max 1 None p #pop-options
t:rbtree' -> Tot color
t:rbtree' -> Tot (option nat)
t:rbtree' -> Pure nat (requires (b2t (T? t))) (ensures (fun r -> True))
t:rbtree' -> Pure nat (requires (b2t (T? t))) (ensures (fun r -> True))
t:rbtree' -> Tot bool
t:rbtree' -> Tot bool
t:rbtree' -> Tot bool
t:rbtree' -> Tot bool
t:rbtree' -> k:nat -> Tot bool

c:color -> lt:rbtree' -> ky:nat -> rt:rbtree' -> Pure rbtree' (requires (pre_balance c lt ky rt)) (ensures (fun r -> post_balance c lt ky rt r)) #reset-options "--z3rlimit 40" (* it's pretty cool that the spec is proved easily without any hints ! *)

t:rbtree' -> k:nat -> Pure rbtree' (requires (c_inv t /\ h_inv t /\ k_inv t)) (ensures (fun r -> (* returned tree is a T *) (T? r) /\ (* * returned tree satisfies k_inv * moreover, min elt in returned tree is either k (the new key) * or same as the min elt in input t (resp. for max element) * if t is E, then min (and max) elt in returned tree must be k *) (k_inv r /\ (min_elt r = k \/ (T? t /\ min
t:rbtree' -> Pure rbtree' (requires (T? t /\ c_inv t /\ h_inv t /\ k_inv t)) (ensures (fun r -> balanced_rbtree' r /\ (forall k. in_tree t k <==> in_tree r k)))

t:rbtree' -> x:nat -> Pure rbtree' (requires (balanced_rbtree' t)) (ensures (fun r -> balanced_rbtree' r /\ (forall k'. (in_tree t k' ==> in_tree r k') /\ (in_tree r k' ==> (in_tree t k' \/ k' = x)) )))
rbtree -> Pure rbtree' (requires True) (ensures (fun r -> balanced_rbtree' r))

lemma_init_aux_len' private let rec lemma_init_ghost_aux_len' (#a:Type) (n:nat) (k:nat{k < n}) (contents:(i:nat{ i < n } -> GTot a)) : Lemma (requires True) (ensures (length (init_aux_ghost n k conten
val add_comm: a:int -> b:int -> Lemma (a + b == b + a)
tactic_proof: let add_comm a b = ()

goal: val add_assoc: a:int -> b:int -> c:int -> Lemma ((a + b) + c == a + (b + c))
tactic_proof: let add_assoc a b c = ()

goal: val mul_comm: a:int -> b:int -> Lemma (a * b == b * a)
tactic_proof: let mul_comm a b = ()

goal: val mul_assoc: a:int -> b:int -> c:int -> Lemma ((a * b) * c == a * (b * c))
tactic_proof: let mul_assoc a b c = ()

goal: val distributive: a:int -> b:int -> c:int -> Lemma (a * (b + c) == a * b + a * c)
tactic_proof: let distributive a b c = ()

goal: val add_zero_r: a:int -> Lemma (a + 0 == a)
tactic_proof: let add_zero_r a = ()

goal: val mul_one_r: a:int -> Lemma (a * 1 == a)
tactic_proof: let mul_one_r a = ()

goal: val mul_zero_r: a:int -> Lemma (a * 0 == 0)
tactic_proof: let mul_zero_r a = ()

goal: val pow_add: b:nat -> m:nat -> n:nat -> Lemma (ensures pow b (m + n) == pow b m * pow b n) (decreases m)
tactic_proof: let rec pow_add b m n = if m = 0 then () else pow_add b (m - 1) n

goal: val pow_mul: b:nat -> m:nat -> n:nat -> Lemma (ensures pow b (m * n) == pow (pow b m) n) (decreases n)
tactic_proof: let rec pow_mul b m n = if n = 0 then () else (pow_add b m (m * (n - 1)); pow_mul b m (n - 1))

goal: val mod_add: a:int -> b:int -> n:pos -> Lemma ((a + b) % n == ((a % n) + (b % n)) % n)
tactic_proof: let mod_add a b n = FStar.Math.Lemmas.lemma_mod_plus_distr_l a b n

goal: val div_exact: a:nat -> b:pos -> Lemma (requires a % b == 0) (ensures a / b * b == a)
tactic_proof: let div_exact a b = FStar.Math.Lemmas.lemma_div_exact a b

goal: val append_nil: #a:Type -> l:list a -> Lemma (l @ [] == l)
tactic_proof: let rec append_nil #a l = match l with | [] -> () | _::tl -> append_nil tl

goal: val append_assoc: #a:Type -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> l3:list a -> Lemma ((l1 @ l2) @ l3 == l1 @ (l2 @ l3))
tactic_proof: let rec append_assoc #a l1 l2 l3 = match l1 with | [] -> () | _::tl -> append_assoc tl l2 l3

goal: val length_append: #a:Type -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> Lemma (length (l1 @ l2) == length l1 + length l2)
tactic_proof: let rec length_append #a l1 l2 = match l1 with | [] -> () | _::tl -> length_append tl l2

goal: val rev_rev: #a:Type -> l:list a -> Lemma (rev (rev l) == l)
tactic_proof: let rec rev_rev #a l = match l with | [] -> () | hd::tl -> rev_append_rev tl [hd]; rev_rev tl

goal: val map_append: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> f:(a -> b) -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> Lemma (map f (l1 @ l2) == map f l1 @ map f l2)
tactic_proof: let rec map_append #a #b f l1 l2 = match l1 with | [] -> () | _::tl -> map_append f tl l2

goal: val length_map: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> f:(a -> b) -> l:list a -> Lemma (length (map f l) == length l)
tactic_proof: let rec length_map #a #b f l = match l with | [] -> () | _::tl -> length_map f tl

goal: val mem_append: #a:eqtype -> x:a -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> Lemma (mem x (l1 @ l2) <==> mem x l1 || mem x l2)
tactic_proof: let rec mem_append #a x l1 l2 = match l1 with | [] -> () | _::tl -> mem_append x tl l2

goal: val filter_append: #a:Type -> f:(a -> bool) -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> Lemma (filter f (l1 @ l2) == filter f l1 @ filter f l2)
tactic_proof: let rec filter_append #a f l1 l2 = match l1 with | [] -> () | hd::tl -> filter_append f tl l2

goal: val fold_left_append: #a:Type -> #b:Type -> f:(b -> a -> b) -> init:b -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> Lemma (fold_left f init (l1 @ l2) == fold_left f (fold_left f init l1) l2)
tactic_proof: let rec fold_left_append #a #b f init l1 l2 = match l1 with | [] -> () | hd::tl -> fold_left_append f (f init hd) tl l2

goal: val for_all_append: #a:Type -> f:(a -> bool) -> l1:list a -> l2:list a -> Lemma (for_all f (l1 @ l2) <==> for_all f l1 && for_all f l2)
tactic_proof: let rec for_all_append #a f l1 l2 = match l1 with | [] -> () | _::tl -> for_all_append f tl l2

goal: val aead_encrypt_decrypt: k:key -> n:nonce -> p:plaintext -> ad:aad -> Lemma (ensures (let c = aead_encrypt k n p ad in aead_decrypt k n c ad == Some p))
val hmac_verify: k:key -> m:msg -> t:tag -> Lemma (requires t == hmac k m) (ensures verify_hmac k m t == true)
val hash_collision_resistance: m1:msg -> m2:msg -> Lemma (requires m1 <> m2) (ensures hash m1 <> hash m2) [SMTPat (hash m1); SMTPat (hash m2)]
val kdf_extract_length: salt:bytes -> ikm:bytes -> Lemma (ensures length (kdf_extract salt ikm) == hash_length)
val chacha20_involutive: k:key -> n:nonce -> ctr:nat -> p:bytes -> Lemma (ensures chacha20 k n ctr (chacha20 k n ctr p) == p)
val incr: r:ref int -> ST unit (requires fun h -> True) (ensures fun h0 _ h1 -> sel h1 r == sel h0 r + 1)
tactic_proof: let incr r = r := !r + 1

goal: val swap: r1:ref int -> r2:ref int -> ST unit (requires fun h -> True) (ensures fun h0 _ h1 -> sel h1 r1 == sel h0 r2 /\ sel h1 r2 == sel h0 r1)
tactic_proof: let swap r1 r2 = let t = !r1 in r1 := !r2; r2 := t

goal: val factorial: n:nat -> Tot (r:nat{r >= 1})
tactic_proof: let rec factorial n = if n = 0 then 1 else n * factorial (n - 1)

goal: val fibonacci: n:nat -> Tot nat (decreases n)
tactic_proof: let rec fibonacci n = if n <= 1 then n else fibonacci (n - 1) + fibonacci (n - 2)

goal: val alloc_and_free: n:nat -> ST unit (requires fun h -> True) (ensures fun h0 _ h1 -> modifies Set.empty h0 h1)
tactic_proof: let alloc_and_free n = let r = alloc n in free r

goal: val nat_positive: n:nat{n > 0} -> Tot (r:nat{r >= 0})
tactic_proof: let nat_positive n = n - 1

goal: val bounded_add: a:nat{a < 100} -> b:nat{b < 100} -> Tot (r:nat{r < 200})
tactic_proof: let bounded_add a b = a + b

goal: val safe_div: a:int -> b:int{b <> 0} -> Tot int
tactic_proof: let safe_div a b = a / b

goal: val vector_index: #n:nat -> v:vector n -> i:nat{i < n} -> Tot elem
tactic_proof: let vector_index #n v i = Seq.index v i

goal: val sorted_insert: x:int -> l:list int{sorted l} -> Tot (r:list int{sorted r /\ length r == length l + 1})
val non_empty_head: #a:Type -> l:list a{Cons? l} -> Tot a
tactic_proof: let non_empty_head #a l = match l with | hd::_ -> hd

goal: val matrix_mult: #m:nat -> #n:nat -> #p:nat -> matrix m n -> matrix n p -> Tot (matrix m p)
val well_typed_eval: #t:typ -> e:exp{has_type e t} -> Tot (v:value{value_type v t})
val ackermann: m:nat -> n:nat -> Tot nat (decreases %[m; n])
tactic_proof: let rec ackermann m n = if m = 0 then n + 1 else if n = 0 then ackermann (m - 1) 1 else ackermann (m - 1) (ackermann m (n - 1))

goal: val gcd: a:nat -> b:nat{a > 0 || b > 0} -> Tot (r:pos) (decreases b)
tactic_proof: let rec gcd a b = if b = 0 then a else gcd b (a % b)

goal: val collatz_steps: n:pos -> Tot nat (decreases %[n; if n = 1 then 0 else 1])

val mutual_even: n:nat -> Tot bool (decreases n)
val mutual_odd: n:nat -> Tot bool (decreases n)
tactic_proof:
let rec mutual_even n = if n = 0 then true else mutual_odd (n - 1)
and mutual_odd n = if n = 0 then false else mutual_even (n - 1)
